_meta.note: Condensed index of Purview names for UI selection. **Primary** full Boon / Innate / Marvel text: SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf; tier books only where PB points there. Optional: `purviewInnateName` / `purviewInnateSummary` surface innate blurbs (they are not Boon picks). Optional `boonLadderNames`: string array of length 12 — printed Boon titles for positions 1–12 (`{purview}_dot_01` … `_dot_12` in the catalog); use "" for positions not transcribed yet. The wizard and sheet use these for chip titles when set. Optional `boonLadderNameByDot`: object map `"1"`…`"12"` to a name if you prefer sparse entries.

artistry.name: Artistry
artistry.mechanicalEffects: Access Boons/Marvels per tier and Purview rules in Pandora’s Box.

beasts.name: Beasts
beasts.description: Animals, monstrous companions, and beastly motifs.
beasts.mechanicalEffects: Boons specify epithets/tags (e.g., Falcon) in Appendix listings.

chaos.name: Chaos
chaos.description: Entropy, disruption, and unmaking of order.
chaos.mechanicalEffects: Purview Boons scale with Legend and tier.

death.name: Death
death.description: Mortality, ghosts, and the road to the dead.
death.purviewInnateSummary: You sense death’s touch—recent deaths, corpses, and restless dead nearby register clearly; you can read a body’s obvious cause of death. (Full mechanics and limits: Scion: Hero / Pandora’s Box — Death Purview innate.)

earth.name: Earth
earth.description: Stone, soil, and the bones of the World.
earth.mechanicalEffects: Includes Boons like shaping or animating earth where tier allows.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: Making, mending, and industry of the divine.

fortune.name: Fortune
fortune.description: Luck, omen, and the weaving of chance—threads of fate, omens, and turning points. This is the universal fate-and-luck Purview from Pandora’s Box (other books may name related Specialty Purviews separately).
fortune.purviewInnateSummary: Use Scion: Hero and Pandora’s Box for the standard Fortune Purview Innate (not a Boon).

wyrd.name: Wyrd
wyrd.description: The Æsir Hero **Signature** Specialty—binding, orlæg, and what was woven before you drew breath (Scion: Hero). Wyrd has its own Boon entries in this app; it is not the universal fate Purview other Scions take from the same chapter.
wyrd.purviewInnateSummary: Use Scion: Hero for the Wyrd Innate (Æsir Signature).
wyrd.mechanicalEffects: Wyrd Boons: Cast the Runes, Runic Charm, Spin the Thread (Hero); resolve details with your Storyguide.

journeys.name: Journeys
boonLadderNames: Gate at the End of the Year

moon.name: Moon
moon.description: Lunar cycles, tides of madness and intuition.

passion.name: Passion
passion.description: Emotions given mythic weight—love, rage, fear, etc.
passion.mechanicalEffects: Often tagged with specific emotions in deity write-ups.

sky.name: Sky
sky.description: Heavens, weather, and the high places.

stars.name: Stars
stars.description: Celestial patterns, astrology, and far voyages.

sun.name: Sun
boonLadderNames: Falling Through the Edge of Time

war.name: War
war.description: Battle, strategy, and the red work.

water.name: Water
water.description: Oceans, rivers, rain, and the drowning deep.

wild.name: Wild
wild.description: Untamed places and instincts beyond civilization.

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.description: Shadow, concealment, and what hunts within it.

epicStrength.name: Epic Strength
epicStrength.mechanicalEffects: Epic Attribute Purview—see Pandora’s Box for Boons.

epicStamina.name: Epic Stamina
epicStamina.mechanicalEffects: Epic Attribute Purview—see Pandora’s Box for Boons.

epicDexterity.name: Epic Dexterity
epicDexterity.description: Mythic speed and precision beyond mortal limits.
epicDexterity.mechanicalEffects: Epic Attribute Purview—see Pandora’s Box for Boons.

frost.name: Frost
frost.description: Cold, winter, and the stillness of ice.

arcaneCalculus.name: Arcane Calculus
arcaneCalculus.description: The Mythos pantheon Signature Purview: forbidden and revelatory mathematics—knowledge pursued regardless of cost, mapping truths that strain sanity and Fate.
arcaneCalculus.mechanicalEffects: Innate powers, Marvels, and Boons per Scion: Masks of the Mythos; confirm limits with that book and Pandora’s Box where cross-listed. MotM prints two titled Boons for this Signature (see boons.json); further Awareness Boons are chronicle/SG work at the table — this app does not invent catalog entries for them.

nemeton.name: Nemeton
nemeton.description: The Nemetondevos pantheon Signature Purview: sacred shrines whose mementos open gates to Gaulish Godsrealms or your Sanctum—terrain, memory, and the Wheel’s cycle.
nemeton.mechanicalEffects: Innate power, Marvels, and Boons per Mysteries of the World (Nemeton chapter); Hero limits on how many nemetons you may hold apply per that write-up.

asha.name: Asha
asha.description: The Yazata pantheon Signature Purview: the Threefold Path of good thoughts, words, and deeds—cosmic harmony, truth, and the struggle against the Druj.
asha.mechanicalEffects: Innate powers, Marvels, Mantles, and Boons per Mysteries of the World; confirm tiers and costs with that book.

shuila.name: Shuilá
shuila.description: The Anunna Signature: fate-deeds, tablets of office, and the weight of what was decreed before you spoke.
shuila.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

pachakutic.name: Pachakutic
pachakutic.description: The Apu Signature: world-turning, mountain omens, and the hinge moments of ages.
pachakutic.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

atuaMana.name: Mana
atuaMana.description: The Atua Signature: power-as-presence, right relationship, and the face you cannot fake before your kin.
atuaMana.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

paganito.name: Paganito
paganito.description: The Balahala Signature: ancestor compact, vigil of the dead, and bargains sealed in smoke.
paganito.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

dvoeverie.name: Dvoeverie
dvoeverie.description: The Bogovi Signature: twinned truth, hidden worship, and the old law that walks in two skins.
dvoeverie.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

yoga.description: The Devá Signature: disciplined devotion, earned insight, and the body as a practiced instrument of truth.
yoga.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

marzeh.name: Marzeh
marzeh.description: The Ilhm Signature: feast-law, lineage rolls, and the obligations guests inherit when bread is broken.
marzeh.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

tzolkin.description: The K’uh Signature: sacred calendar, appointed sorrow, and days that arrive already decided.
tzolkin.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

yaoyorozuNoKamigami.name: Yaoyorozu-no-Kamigami
yaoyorozuNoKamigami.description: The Kami Signature: myriad kami acknowledged, propitiated, and set quietly watching at thresholds.
yaoyorozuNoKamigami.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

dodaem.name: Dodaem
dodaem.description: The Manitou Signature: totem medicine, dream-quest instruction, and war-songs that bind the camp.
dodaem.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

heku.name: Heku
heku.description: The Netjer Signature: speaking power, effigies that move, and the harvest of living sekhem.
heku.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

tianming.name: Tianming
tianming.description: The Shén Signature: Heaven’s mandate read in omens, promotion earned in trial, and the red thread of office.
tianming.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

qut.name: Qut
qut.description: The Tengri Signature: contest-fortune, spirit interrogation, and the ransom taken from spilled blood.
qut.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

yidam.name: Yidam
yidam.description: The Pālas Signature: tutelary manifestation, vows made visible, and practice pressed into the world.
yidam.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).

behique.name: Behique
behique.description: The Zem Signature: spirit-shapes, idols that answer, and medicine that follows form, not argument.
behique.purviewInnateSummary: Use SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf and Scion: Hero for this Signature Purview’s Innate (not a Boon pick in the catalog).
